summary: The team is sprinting to finalize the New Chinese Playbook report for a September launch in Singapore while simultaneously launching Asia Start campaigns and building the Intelligent China program.
summaryDetail: The top priority is the New Chinese Playbook report with IE, targeting launch at Tech in Asia (Sep 15-16) or Tyson event (Sep 29-30) in Singapore. Felix meets Tech in Asia tomorrow to confirm the venue; the team must deliver a one-pager proposal, translate the Chinese report, and secure op-eds from leadership and alumni case studies this week. Asia Start is live with dual AI and traditional campaigns for the first month, and Intelligent China program website needs to be ready for a December launch. Urgent this week: finalize the report structure and translations, confirm professor Leeway's involvement, and decide the Intelligent China campaign approach.

meetings.title: New Chinese Playbook Report Planning
meetings.summary: Team discusses joint report between CKGSB and IE on Chinese companies globalizing to Southeast Asia, with op-eds from leadership and case studies, aiming for launch at Tech in Asia or Tyson events in Singapore mid-September.

meetings.title: Asia Start & New Program Planning
meetings.summary: Discussed campaign strategies for Asia Start (AI vs traditional routes) and a new 'Intelligent China' program launching in December, focusing on module one in Beijing.

meetings.title: China-Europe Cooperation Discussion
meetings.summary: Discussion on China-Europe relations, focusing on geopolitical tensions, de-risking, and the role of companies versus governments in market operations.

actionItems.text: Meet with Tech in Asia tomorrow to confirm event theme and possibility of launching report there.
actionItems.detail: Tech in Asia event may focus on startups, not Chinese globalization; need to align.

actionItems.text: Prepare a one-pager proposal for the report structure, title, and promotion plan.
actionItems.detail: To show to president Santiago and get buy-in.

actionItems.text: Translate the bulk of the Chinese report into English.
actionItems.detail: Core research from professor Leeway needs translation.

actionItems.text: Identify and translate relevant alumni case studies from WeChat accounts for industry perspective.
actionItems.detail: Quick approval since content already exists.

actionItems.text: Reach out to alumnus Tian for an op-ed on his investment firm's experience in Southeast Asia.
actionItems.detail: Potential industry perspective, but consider internal politics.

actionItems.text: Confirm with professor Leeway about joint publication and distribution.
actionItems.detail: Report jointly published by CKGSB and IE.

actionItems.text: Finalize Asia Start campaign routes for first month
actionItems.detail: Joseph uses AI route, Daisy uses traditional strategy; decide after first month.

actionItems.text: Get website for Intelligent China program ready
actionItems.detail: Website nearly ready; needed to start SCM campaign.

actionItems.text: Decide campaign approach for Intelligent China program
actionItems.detail: Choose between AI or traditional route for the new program.

actionItems.meetingTitle: Re: News Article on 'Disruptive Timing' Paper
actionItems.detail: Julie and Ira revised the article; Professor Zhu provided further suggestions to sharpen the title and opening.

actionItems.detail: Ira will reach out to Shouhuo to confirm the final version with the Dean after Julie's edits.

actionItems.text: Prepare joint report with IE on Chinese companies going global
actionItems.detail: Ira coordinated with Professor Li Wei, who agreed to collaborate; plan shared with team for review.

actionItems.text: Review and provide feedback on joint report plan
actionItems.detail: Joseph reviewed the plan and approved it without additional changes.

actionItems.text: Review and provide feedback on joint report plan
actionItems.detail: Julie reviewed the plan and thought it looked great.

actionItems.meetingTitle: RE: press release - Sun Tianshu at Summer Davos 2026
actionItems.detail: Joseph will review the final version after Ira's edits.

actionItems.text: Update team dashboard with new link
actionItems.detail: Joseph provided a corrected link to the team dashboard.

decisions.text: Report will be jointly published by CKGSB and IE, distributed via both schools' channels.
Working title: 'The New Chinese Playbook for Going Global'.
Report will include a main research feature by professor Leeway, op-eds from CKGSB president Santiago and IE dean, and industry perspectives (case studies or alum op-ed).
Target launch at either Tech in Asia (Sep 15-16) or Tyson event (Sep 29-30) in Singapore, with digital version ready by early September.
Asia Start will run two parallel campaigns for the first month: AI (Joseph) and traditional (Daisy).
Intelligent China program targets foreigners, is in English, and focuses on module one (Beijing) initially.
Go with the title 'China's Gateway' for the article on behalf of Dean
decisions.meetingTitle: Re: Article on Behalf of Dean

decisions.text: Professor Li Wei is happy to collaborate with IE on the joint report
